products.name: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones
products.description: Premium wireless headphones with active noise cancellation, 30-hour battery life, and comfortable over-ear design. Features Bluetooth 5.0 for seamless connectivity.

products.name: Smart Watch Pro
products.description: Advanced smartwatch with health monitoring, GPS tracking, heart rate sensor, and 7-day battery life. Water resistant with vibrant AMOLED display.

products.name: Men's Classic Fit Shirt
products.description: Premium cotton classic fit shirt available in multiple colors. Perfect for both casual and formal occasions with wrinkle-resistant fabric.

products.name: Leather Crossbody Bag
products.description: Genuine leather crossbody bag with multiple compartments. Adjustable strap with premium metal hardware. Ideal for daily use and travel.

products.name: Stainless Steel Water Bottle
products.description: Double-walled vacuum insulated bottle. Keeps drinks cold 24hrs or hot 12hrs. BPA-free, leak-proof, and eco-friendly design.

products.name: Running Shoes Ultra
products.description: Lightweight running shoes with responsive cushioning and breathable mesh upper. Engineered for comfort during long runs with superior grip.

products.name: Portable Bluetooth Speaker
products.description: Waterproof portable speaker with 360-degree sound. 12-hour battery with built-in microphone. Perfect for outdoor adventures.

products.name: LED Desk Lamp
products.description: Adjustable LED desk lamp with 5 brightness levels and 3 color temperatures. USB charging port, touch control, and eye-care technology.

products.name: Organic Green Tea Set
products.description: Premium organic green tea collection with 3 varieties. Includes 60 tea bags in eco-friendly packaging. Rich in antioxidants.

products.name: Wireless Mouse
products.description: Ergonomic wireless mouse with silent clicks, adjustable DPI, and long battery life. Compatible with all major operating systems.

products.name: Denim Jacket
products.description: Classic denim jacket with modern fit. Made from premium quality denim with slight stretch for comfort. Features button closure and chest pockets.

products.name: Fitness Tracker Band
products.description: Slim fitness tracker with heart rate monitor, step counter, sleep tracking, and smartphone notifications. Water resistant with 14-day battery.

reviews.comment: Amazing sound quality! The noise cancellation is top-notch. Battery lasts really long as promised.
Very comfortable for long use. Great bass response. Would recommend!
Excellent quality leather bag. Looks premium and has plenty of space for daily essentials.
Perfect running shoes! Very lightweight and comfortable. True to size.
Best water bottle I've ever owned. Keeps water cold all day long. Worth every penny!
